title: DA1 5PZ, National Grid Electricity Transmission PLC: environmental permit issued - EPR/TP3738MY/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: National Grid Electricity Transmission PLC   Installation name: Dartford Oil Management Unit   Permit number: EPR/TP3738MY/V005   "
